decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and efficient Elf aggro strategy. By utilizing cards like Priest of Titania and Llanowar Elves to ramp up mana production, the deck can quickly deploy threats like Timberwatch Elf and Nyxborn Hydra. Quirion Ranger and Lead the Stampede help maintain card advantage and board presence. With a low mana curve and high creature count, this deck aims to swarm the opponent with powerful Elves and outpace them before they can stabilize.

The main focus of this Gruul Aggro deck is to quickly ramp up mana using cards like Wild Growth, Arbor Elf, and Utopia Sprawl to play powerful creatures like Annoyed Altisaur and Avenging Hunter. With a mix of land destruction cards like Mwonvuli Acid-Moss and Thermokarst, along with removal spells like Malevolent Rumble and Structural Distortion, this deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while hitting hard and fast with aggressive creatures. The inclusion of Writhing Chrysalis and Eldrazi Repurposer provide additional threats and versatility in combat.

The deck focuses on utilizing cards that generate value through sacrificing creatures and drawing cards, while also controlling the opponent's board with removal spells and graveyard hate. Utilizing Golgari and Jund lands, the deck aims to create a constant stream of tokens through Khalni Garden and Ichor Wellspring to sacrifice for additional benefits. The inclusion of Thorn of the Black Rose provides a consistent card advantage engine, while Crypt Rats and Defile help to control the opponent's side of the battlefield. Overall, the deck aims to grind out incremental advantages and outvalue the opponent in a Pauper 1 vs 1 format.

The deck focuses on a fast and aggressive playstyle, utilizing cheap artifacts and artifact creatures to overwhelm the opponent. By sacrificing artifacts for damage or card draw, and utilizing cards that benefit from having multiple artifacts on the battlefield, the deck aims to quickly deplete the opponent's life total. With a mix of burn spells, card draw, and creature aggression, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while also disrupting their game plan.

The main focus of this Dimir Control deck is to disrupt and control the opponent's strategy using a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and disruptive creatures. By efficiently controlling the board and cards in hand, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and gradually gain card advantage. Using cards like Spellstutter Sprite and Faerie Seer to disrupt the opponent's spells, along with removal like Snuff Out and Cast Down, this deck aims to maintain control of the game until it can establish a win condition. The inclusion of card draw and card selection spells like Brainstorm helps to maintain consistency and find key pieces to close out the game.

This Jund Aggro deck focuses on efficient creature removal, resource denial, and sacrificing artifacts for value. It aims to disrupt opponent's game plan while building its own board presence and card advantage. Using cards like Cast Down and Krark-Clan Shaman for removal, Drossforge Bridge and Ichor Wellspring for card draw, and Cleansing Wildfire for land destruction, the deck aims to control the game tempo and overwhelm the opponent with its aggressive creatures like Nyxborn Hydra and Refurbished Familiar. The addition of sacrifice outlets like Fanatical Offering and Makeshift Munitions adds versatility and reach to the deck's gameplay strategy.

The deck focuses on dealing damage quickly and efficiently to the opponent by using cheap and direct burn spells, while also benefiting from triggered abilities such a Guttersnipe and Sneaky Snacker to further increase the damage output. The deck is designed to be aggressive, aiming to end the game as fast as possible before the opponent has a chance to stabilize. It also includes card draw and graveyard manipulation to ensure a consistent stream of burn spells to close out the game.

The main focus of this Pauper Aggro-Burn deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent using a combination of direct burn spells and creatures that provide additional damage. By utilizing cards like Lightning Bolt, Fireblast, and Fiery Temper, as well as creatures like Guttersnipe and Kessig Flamebreather, this deck aims to efficiently burn through the opponent's life total while also controlling the battlefield with cards like Grab the Prize and Sneaky Snacker. The deck's aggressive strategy is further supported by efficient card draw and graveyard interaction through Faithless Looting and Lava Dart.

This deck focuses on utilizing a combination of removal spells, artifacts, and creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. By utilizing cards like Refurbished Familiar and Twisted Landscape to generate value, as well as Cast Down and Cleansing Wildfire to control the board, this deck aims to establish early board presence and maintain pressure throughout the game. With a mix of efficient threats and disruption, this Aggro - Jund deck aims to outpace the opponent and secure victory through a combination of creature aggression and resource denial.

The main idea of this deck is to utilize the Aggro strategy with a Jund color combination to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creatures and spells. The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Cleansing Wildfire and Nihil Spellbomb, while also controlling the board with aggressive creatures like Krark-Clan Shaman and Refurbished Familiar. In addition, the deck incorporates removal spells like Cast Down to deal with threats and maintain tempo. Overall, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and disrupt the opponent's game plan to secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana using cards like Wild Growth and Utopia Sprawl to power out aggressive, efficient creatures like Jewel Thief and Avenging Hunter. These creatures are supported by combat tricks like Ram Through and Malevolent Rumble to push through damage and control the board. Nyxborn Hydra and Bannerhide Krushok provide additional threats and resilience, while Writhing Chrysalis can generate more creatures. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and powerful aggro strategy.

The main focus of this Gruul Aggro deck is to quickly ramp up mana with Arbor Elf, Utopia Sprawl, and Wild Growth, while disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Mwonvuli Acid-Moss and Malevolent Rumble. The deck also utilizes aggressive creatures like Annoyed Altisaur and Avenging Hunter to pressure the opponent and finish the game quickly. Additionally, the deck includes removal spells like Thermokarst and Structural Distortion to deal with opposing threats. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with early aggression and disruption to secure a victory.

The deck focuses on using a combination of sacrifice effects, creature removal, and card draw to control the game. By utilizing cards like Pestilence, Fanatical Offering, and Eviscerator's Insight, the deck aims to maintain board control while generating card advantage through Lembas and Ichor Wellspring. The Golgari / Jund color combination allows for flexibility in removal options and graveyard recursion with cards like Grapple with Death and Heritage Reclamation. With a mix of efficient removal spells and resilient threats like Cauldron Familiar and Troll of Khazad-dûm, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast opponents in a grindy match-up.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy through counterspells and card draw, while utilizing cheap and efficient creatures to pressure the opponent. The goal is to control the game tempo, generate card advantage, and overwhelm the opponent with threats that are difficult to deal with. The deck also includes a few utility spells to deal with specific threats or situations, adding flexibility to its game plan. Overall, the deck aims to outplay and outmaneuver the opponent in order to secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent using burn spells and aggressive creatures. With cards like Fiery Temper, Lightning Bolt, and Fireblast, the deck aims to burn the opponent's life total down as fast as possible. Creatures like Guttersnipe and Kessig Flamebreather help to add extra damage whenever burn spells are played. Grab the Prize and Highway Robbery offer additional ways to deal damage while also gaining resources. The objective is to overwhelm the opponent and win the game before they have a chance to stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to create a fast-paced aggressive strategy, utilizing a combination of creatures and spells to overwhelm the opponent. By sacrificing permanents and utilizing cards like Fanatical Offering and Writhing Chrysalis, the deck aims to quickly build up a board presence and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, cards like Cleansing Wildfire and Nihil Spellbomb provide additional utility and disruption. Overall, the deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain it throughout the game, capitalizing on the opponent's weaknesses and establishing dominance in the match.
